_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: MPNST showed a moderate to high labelling for Ki67 (highest in S462 with nearly 100%) and for p53 (highest in S462 with about 80%)
details: Showed highest Ki67 expression (nearly 100%) and p53 expression (about 80%) among MPNST cell lines
